      How to Use the Builder

      1. Choose a world.
      2. Select an object or block.
      3. Build your idea.
      4. Use the tools to move, rotate, or color objects.
      5. Complete your mission.
      6. Reading with BOB: Press Tab to focus a reading word, then press Enter or Space to have BOB read from that word.
